mapper.sql: id, session_id, memory_type, role, content, summary, importance, memory_tags, tool_calls::text AS tool_calls, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at, updated_at, archived_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_memory_entry (session_id, memory_type, role, content, summary, importance, memory_tags, tool_calls, metadata) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{memoryType}, #{role}, #{content}, #{summary}, COALESCE(#{importance}, 0), #{memoryTags, jdbcType=ARRAY, typeHandler=com.kama.jchatmind.typehandler.StringListTypeHandler}, CAST(#{toolCalls} AS jsonb), CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb))
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_memory_entry WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_memory_entry
memory_type = #{memoryType}, role = #{role}, content = #{content}, summary = #{summary}, importance = #{importance},
memory_tags = #{memoryTags, jdbcType=ARRAY, typeHandler=com.kama.jchatmind.typehandler.StringListTypeHandler},
tool_calls = CAST(#{toolCalls} AS jsonb), metadata = CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb), archived_at = #{archivedAt}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
UPDATE t_memory_entry SET summary = #{summary}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)

UPDATE t_memory_entry SET importance = #{importance}, memory_tags = #{tags, jdbcType=ARRAY, typeHandler=com.kama.jchatmind.typehandler.StringListTypeHandler}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
UPDATE t_memory_entry SET memory_type = #{memoryType}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
UPDATE t_memory_entry SET memory_type = 'ARCHIVE', archived_at = #{archivedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_memory_entry WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
